prompt: Summarize the provider capability metadata a local MLX server should expose so FusionKit can route and benchmark it safely. Do not include implementation code or a patch solution.
expected_evidence: Mentions health, capability, model id, context, tool support, and structured output metadata.
Explains how provider metadata feeds routing and benchmark rows.
contamination_notes: Synthetic dirty-dozen task derived from public roadmap concepts; contains no customer data and no answer or patch solution.
